script:
the work is the way


the work is the way


Every morning in Rome, before the palace stirred, Marcus Aurelius wrote in a small journal by lamplight. Not for posterity. Not for praise. He wrote because the writing was the work, and the work was the only thing that kept the emperor honest with himself. He did it before anything else could claim him.


You swore last night to finish the OATH spec without doomscrolling first.


That is the only thing on the ledger this morning.


the work is the way


Open the laptop.

Close every other tab.

Begin.
